name_en: Premium Original Leather M25255 Black Small Size. This Capucines BB bag features matte Taurillon cowhide leather with metal hardware, showcasing a sharp style. The flap offers either an external or inward-opening style, and the tidy interior features multiple pockets. Adjust the shoulder strap for a crossbody option. Dimensions: 27 × 17.3 × 9 cm
